shared_task: Help frame the research described in the benchmark case as a concrete business-research problem. Preserve the supplied model and identify claims or information that remain unsupported.

no_skill.instruction: Respond as you normally would to this user request using only the serialized case material. Do not assume facts that are not supplied.
